_meta.purpose: 知识图谱·业务逻辑维度节点/边（doc 17 foreclosure 业务入门 + doc 18 LM 业务入门 + doc 10 术语）。由抽取 agent 生成、人工核对。脚本只排版。

nodes.desc_zh: 贷款方依据抵押合同，在借款人持续违约（通常≥120天）后，通过法律程序强制出售抵押房产以收回欠款的过程。是法律状态而非逾期程度，必须由Servicer显式标注，系统内部码FCL。
nodes.desc_en: Lender's legal process to force-sell the mortgaged property to recover the debt after borrower default (usually >=120 days). A legal state, not a delinquency level; must be flagged by the servicer (code FCL).

nodes.desc_zh: 须经法院起诉、裁决、拍卖的止赎程序，借款人有权答辩。典型州：纽约、新泽西、佛罗里达；典型时长12个月至3年，多有法定赎回期。
nodes.desc_en: Court-supervised foreclosure requiring suit, judgment and sale; borrower may defend. Typical states NY/NJ/FL; lasts 12 months to 3 years, often with a redemption period.

nodes.desc_zh: 依据合同中权力出售条款直接拍卖，无需法院。典型州：加州、得州、佐治亚；典型时长2至6个月，通常无赎回期，拍卖后产权立即转移。
nodes.desc_en: Power-of-sale foreclosure executed directly per contract, no court. Typical states CA/TX/GA; lasts 2-6 months, usually no redemption, title transfers immediately at sale.

nodes.desc_zh: 止赎正式启动前贷款方向借款人发出的违约通知函（约30天催告期），要求还款。司法州称NOI/NOD，非司法州称Demand Letter；同字段demandsentdate，≠FCL已启动。
nodes.desc_en: Pre-foreclosure default notice (~30-day cure period) demanding payment. Called NOI/NOD in judicial states, Demand Letter in non-judicial; same field demandsentdate; not yet FCL.

nodes.desc_zh: 止赎的第一个正式阶段：Servicer将案件移交止赎律师，授权启动法律程序。referral_date是FCL时间线的起点，也是BPS收录的入库条件。
nodes.desc_en: First formal FCL stage: servicer refers the case to a foreclosure attorney. referral_date is the start of the FCL timeline and the BPS ingestion condition.

nodes.desc_zh: 止赎律师代表贷款方的首个正式法律步骤：司法州=向法院递交诉状，非司法州=录制违约通知/首次公告。法律时钟开始计时。
nodes.desc_en: First formal legal step by the foreclosure attorney: filing the complaint (judicial) or recording the Notice of Default (non-judicial). Starts the legal clock.

nodes.desc_zh: 法律文件（传票、诉状）正式送达借款人及相关被告，法定抗辩期限开始计算。多被告案件可显著延长此阶段。
nodes.desc_en: Legal documents (summons, complaint) served on borrower and defendants; the statutory response period begins. Multi-defendant cases can extend this stage.

nodes.desc_zh: 非司法州专属阶段：在拍卖日前约21-30天公示拍卖公告。司法州此阶段通常为0。BPS新增以覆盖Service后至拍卖前的监控盲区。
nodes.desc_en: Non-judicial-only stage: auction notice published ~21-30 days before sale. Usually 0 in judicial states. Added by BPS to cover the gap between Service and sale.

nodes.desc_zh: 法院裁决贷款方胜诉、获准出售房产，是司法州拍卖前的最后法律关卡（仅司法州有此阶段）。BPS监控为Upcoming Judgement（已排期待发生）。
nodes.desc_en: Court rules for the lender, authorizing sale; the last legal hurdle before auction in judicial states only. BPS tracks it as Upcoming Judgement (scheduled, pending).

nodes.desc_zh: FCL最终处置阶段：房产公开拍卖。有第三方出价→3rd Party Sale（映射P）；无人出价→归贷款方成为REO。BPS监控为Upcoming FC Sales。
nodes.desc_en: Final FCL disposition: property is auctioned. Third-party bid -> 3rd Party Sale (maps to P); no bid -> lender takes it as REO. BPS tracks it as Upcoming FC Sales.

nodes.desc_zh: 止赎拍卖无人出价，房产所有权由借款人转至贷款方持有，是FCL终点结果之一。贷款方随后作为独立资产挂牌出售，售出后delinq→P。系统内部码REO。
nodes.desc_en: Auction draws no bidder; title passes from borrower to lender, one of the FCL end results. Lender later lists and sells it; on sale delinq -> P. Code REO.

nodes.desc_zh: 拍卖中外部买家出价高于底价成交，房产归第三方所有，是FCL的成功出售结果，贷款关闭，系统内部码映射为P。Newrez以fcresults字段记录。
nodes.desc_en: External bidder wins above the reserve; property goes to a third party. The successful-sale FCL outcome; loan closes, maps to P. Recorded by Newrez fcresults.

nodes.desc_zh: 借款人在拍卖前一次性还清所有欠款及滞纳费用以撤销止赎，恢复贷款履约，FCL→C。司法州多有拍卖后法定赎回期，非司法州通常无。极少见。
nodes.desc_en: Borrower pays all arrears and fees before the sale to cure foreclosure and reinstate the loan (FCL -> C). Judicial states often allow post-sale redemption; rare.

nodes.desc_zh: 贷款方书面同意借款人以低于贷款余额的价格出售房产并豁免差额。属于受控止赎替代方案，贷款关闭后映射为P。既是FCL出口，也是一类LM方案。
nodes.desc_en: Lender agrees the borrower may sell below the loan balance and forgives the shortfall. A controlled foreclosure alternative; loan closes and maps to P. Both an FCL exit and an LM option.

nodes.desc_zh: 借款人主动将房产产权移交贷款方以换取债务解决，避免公开拍卖，对双方损失更小。贷款关闭后映射为P。既是FCL出口，也是退出房产类LM方案。
nodes.desc_en: Borrower voluntarily transfers title to the lender in exchange for debt resolution, avoiding public auction. Loan closes and maps to P. Both an FCL exit and an exit-type LM option.

nodes.desc_zh: 止赎已法律启动（FCL flag=Y）但操作上暂时中止的状态（FCL子态，非独立状态），不改变delinq。常见原因：BK自动中止令、LM审核中、SCRA军人保护、法院指令。
nodes.desc_en: FCL legally started (flag=Y) but operationally paused (a sub-state of FCL, not standalone); delinq unchanged. Causes: BK automatic stay, LM review, SCRA, court order.

nodes.desc_zh: 借款人主动依据美国破产法典（Title 11）向法院申请破产保护，立即触发自动中止令暂停所有催收含止赎。最常见Chapter 7（清算）与Chapter 13（重组）。
nodes.desc_en: Borrower voluntarily files under the US Bankruptcy Code (Title 11), triggering an automatic stay that halts all collection including foreclosure. Most common: Chapter 7 and 13.

nodes.desc_zh: 借款人申请破产后依11 U.S.C. §362立即自动生效的联邦保护，强制暂停所有催收行动（含止赎），无需法院单独命令。使进行中的FCL进入Hold直至破产结束或被解除。
nodes.desc_en: Federal protection auto-effective on BK filing (11 U.S.C. §362), halting all collection (incl. foreclosure) without a separate order. Puts active FCL on Hold until BK ends or stay lifts.

nodes.desc_zh: 贷款方在破产程序中依11 U.S.C. §362(d)向破产法院申请解除自动中止令，以恢复催收和止赎。法院批准后FCL可从Hold恢复推进。
nodes.desc_en: Creditor's motion to the bankruptcy court (11 U.S.C. §362(d)) to lift the automatic stay and resume collection/foreclosure. On grant, FCL resumes from Hold.

nodes.desc_zh: 破产法院免除借款人个人还款责任（Ch.7依§727、Ch.13依§1328）。仅免除个人责任，抵押权（Lien）存续，故Ch.7 discharge≠贷款还清，无BK→P直达。
nodes.desc_en: Court releases the borrower's personal liability (Ch.7 §727, Ch.13 §1328). Only personal liability ends; the lien survives, so Ch.7 discharge != payoff and there is no direct BK -> P.

nodes.desc_zh: 贷款方对房产本身的安全担保权益（in rem），依附于房产而非人。Ch.7破产无法清除，故discharge后银行仍可止赎拍卖，仅差额（Deficiency）不能再向借款人个人追偿。
nodes.desc_en: Lender's in rem security interest attached to the property, not the person. Ch.7 cannot remove it, so post-discharge the lender may still foreclose; only the deficiency is uncollectible from the borrower.

nodes.desc_zh: 清算型破产：托管人变卖非豁免资产偿债，剩余合格债务免除，通常3-6个月。对房贷，借款人不再还款时银行常恢复止赎，故Ch.7往往触发法拍。
nodes.desc_en: Liquidation bankruptcy: a trustee sells non-exempt assets and remaining eligible debt is discharged, usually 3-6 months. For mortgages it often leads back to foreclosure.

nodes.desc_zh: 重组型破产，主要面向企业（也可用于高额个人债务）：债务人在法院监督下提出重组计划，边经营边分期偿债，程序复杂耗时较长。
nodes.desc_en: Reorganization bankruptcy, mainly for businesses (also high-debt individuals): debtor proposes a court-supervised plan, continuing to operate while repaying; complex and lengthy.

nodes.desc_zh: 家庭农场主/渔民重组破产：提交3-5年还款计划，边经营边偿债，门槛和条件比Chapter 13更灵活。
nodes.desc_en: Family-farmer/fisherman reorganization: a 3-5 year repayment plan while operating; thresholds more flexible than Chapter 13.

nodes.desc_zh: 有稳定收入个人的重组（工薪族计划）：提交3-5年分期还款计划补缴拖欠款并保留房产。房贷场景最常见，可保房；计划完成获discharge后贷款reinstate→C。
nodes.desc_en: Reorganization for individuals with steady income (wage-earner's plan): a 3-5 year plan to cure arrears and keep the home. Most common for mortgages; on completion the loan reinstates to C.

nodes.desc_zh: 跨境破产：协调多国之间的破产程序，通常与外国主程序配合，由2005年BAPCPA法案新增，在贷款组合中较少见。
nodes.desc_en: Cross-border insolvency: coordinates proceedings across countries, usually with a foreign main proceeding; added by the 2005 BAPCPA, rare in loan portfolios.

nodes.desc_zh: Ch.13下法院确认的3-5年分期还款计划，借款人按计划补缴拖欠款；履约即Performing BK，完成后贷款恢复履约。
nodes.desc_en: Court-confirmed 3-5 year repayment plan under Ch.13; the borrower cures arrears on schedule. Performing if on track; completion re-performs the loan.

nodes.desc_zh: 借款人破产且正按Ch.13还款计划执行（仍在还款），Newrez复合值Foreclosure/Perf BK。系统delinq仍为FCL，bankruptcy=Y。
nodes.desc_en: Borrower in BK and current on the Ch.13 plan (still paying); Newrez composite Foreclosure/Perf BK. System delinq stays FCL with bankruptcy=Y.

nodes.desc_zh: 借款人破产但未按Ch.13还款计划执行，Newrez复合值Foreclosure/Non-Perf BK。系统delinq仍为FCL，bankruptcy=Y，影响Hold预期时长与走向。
nodes.desc_en: Borrower in BK but not performing the Ch.13 plan; Newrez composite Foreclosure/Non-Perf BK. System delinq stays FCL with bankruptcy=Y; affects expected Hold duration.

nodes.desc_zh: 借款人未按时还款的状态，按逾期天数（DPD）分级为C/D30/D60/D90/D120P。逾期是事实描述，与法律状态FCL不等同；days360兜底最多得D120P，永不产生FCL。
nodes.desc_en: Borrower's missed-payment state, bucketed by days past due into C/D30/D60/D90/D120P. A factual measure, distinct from the legal FCL state; days360 caps at D120P, never FCL.

nodes.desc_zh: 贷款从组合中退出的终态：全额还清/提前还款、Short Sale、DIL、3rd Party Sale或REO处置完成均映射为P。系统内部码P。
nodes.desc_en: Terminal state where the loan exits the portfolio: full payoff, short sale, DIL, 3rd-party sale, or REO disposition all map to P. Code P.

nodes.desc_zh: 按360天/年（每月30天）计算nextduedate与fctrdt之间天数差得到逾期天数，再按档位映射C/D30/D60/D90/D120P。是无显式状态时的DPD兜底算法，永不产生FCL。
nodes.desc_en: Computes days between nextduedate and fctrdt on a 360-day/year basis to get DPD, then buckets to C/D30/D60/D90/D120P. The fallback when no explicit status; never yields FCL.

nodes.desc_zh: 贷款方/Servicer为避免止赎损失、帮助逾期借款人解决问题而提供的一组替代处理方案的总称。是独立业务维度，可与FCL并存，目标是在止赎完成前找到损失更小的路径。
nodes.desc_en: Umbrella for alternative workouts the lender/servicer offers a delinquent borrower to avoid foreclosure loss. An independent dimension that can coexist with FCL, seeking the lowest-loss path before foreclosure completes.

nodes.desc_zh: LM初始阶段：用NPV/承保(UW)/IDI等评估借款人材料并判断适合哪类方案，尚非最终方案。Newrez的deal枚举之一（Evaluation）。
nodes.desc_en: Initial LM stage: assess the borrower's documents via NPV/underwriting/IDI to determine the suitable workout; not a final option. A Newrez deal value (Evaluation).

nodes.desc_zh: 暂停或减少借款人月供一段时间（典型3-12个月），到期后补缴欠款或转入其他方案。COVID期间大量使用，属临时性保房安排。
nodes.desc_en: Temporarily suspends or reduces monthly payments (typically 3-12 months); arrears are repaid or rolled into another option at the end. Heavily used during COVID; a temporary retention measure.

nodes.desc_zh: 永久修改贷款条款（利率、期限、本金余额、还款结构），把月供降至可负担水平。是最根本的LM解决方案，成功后贷款恢复履约。Newrez deal=Modification。
nodes.desc_en: Permanently changes loan terms (rate, term, principal, payment structure) to an affordable payment. The most fundamental LM solution; on success the loan re-performs. Newrez deal=Modification.

nodes.desc_zh: 借款人在恢复正常月供的同时分期补缴历史欠款，通常持续3-6个月，适合短期困难已解决者。Newrez的deal为Payment Plan（Repayment Plan是其program）。
nodes.desc_en: Borrower resumes normal payments while repaying arrears in installments, typically 3-6 months; for short-term hardship. Newrez deal is Payment Plan (Repayment Plan is its program).

nodes.desc_zh: 永久Modification生效前的试用期（通常3期）：借款人按拟议新条款连续按时还款。通过→转永久修改；失败→LM申请被拒。在Newrez非独立deal，属Modification的program/状态。
nodes.desc_en: Trial period (usually 3 payments) before a permanent Modification takes effect. Pass -> permanent mod; fail -> LM denied. Not a standalone Newrez deal; a Modification program/status.

nodes.desc_zh: 把欠款移到贷款末期偿还的保留房产类方案，借款人保留房产。Newrez常见deal之一，状态含递延计划进行、递延协议下单等。
nodes.desc_en: Defers arrears to the end of the loan; a retention option keeping the borrower in the home. A common Newrez deal with statuses like Plan In Progress and Agreement Ordered.

nodes.desc_zh: 本轮LM的大方向（Newrez lmdeal解码），字典13码、数据实测8个：Evaluation/Modification/Forbearance/Payment Plan/Deferment/Short Sale/DIL/Payoff。
nodes.desc_en: The high-level direction of an LM cycle (Newrez lmdeal). Dictionary has 13 codes; 8 observed: Evaluation, Modification, Forbearance, Payment Plan, Deferment, Short Sale, DIL, Payoff.

nodes.desc_zh: Deal下更具体的执行方案，可能是标准名称或Newrez/投资人内部代码（如Bridger mod、496.0、Short Sale、Deed-in-Lieu）。
nodes.desc_en: A more specific execution plan under a Deal; a standard name or a Newrez/investor internal code (e.g., Bridger mod, 496.0, Short Sale, Deed-in-Lieu).

nodes.desc_zh: 本轮LM当前推进到的工作状态（Newrez lmstatus解码），字典约150码、实测22个，覆盖收材料/评估承保/试行/审批/执行/决议各阶段。
nodes.desc_en: Current working status of an LM cycle (Newrez lmstatus). ~150 dictionary codes, 22 observed, spanning triage, evaluation/UW, trial, approval, execution and resolution.

nodes.desc_zh: 本轮LM关闭时的结论：Approved/Denied/Request Incomplete/Referral to FC/Withdrawn/Pending/LMS Opened in Error，决定FCL是撤销、暂停还是继续推进。
nodes.desc_en: Conclusion when an LM cycle closes: Approved, Denied, Request Incomplete, Referral to FC, Withdrawn, Pending, or LMS Opened in Error; determines whether FCL is cancelled, held or resumed.

nodes.desc_zh: 本轮workout/LM方案被拒或终止的决议状态，所有Deal均可发生，随后转回Foreclosure继续推进（Refer to FC）。
nodes.desc_en: Resolution status where the LM workout is denied or terminated; can occur for any Deal and routes back to foreclosure (Refer to FC).

nodes.desc_zh: 贷款从发放经C→D30→D60→D90→D120P逾期升级，叠加FCL/LM/BK并发维度，最终走向P或REO的状态扭转模型。FCL/LM/BK不改变delinq轴。
nodes.desc_en: Model of state transitions from origination through C->D30->D60->D90->D120P with concurrent FCL/LM/BK overlays, ending at P or REO. FCL/LM/BK do not change the delinquency axis.

nodes.desc_zh: 美国抵押贷款银行家协会制定的全行业通用逾期分类标准，规定Current/30-120+ Days/Foreclosure/REO/Paid Off等文本枚举，使各方数据口径一致。带_mba后缀字段遵循此词汇。
nodes.desc_en: Industry-wide delinquency classification by the Mortgage Bankers Association defining text enums (Current, 30-120+ Days, Foreclosure, REO, Paid Off) for comparable data. _mba-suffixed fields follow it.

nodes.desc_zh: 一笔贷款一次完整的止赎经历：从进入到退出（复权/治愈/还清，或拍卖→REO完结）。治愈后可再次进入即新episode，以(loanid, deal_start)为键；与BK为N:N。
nodes.desc_en: One complete foreclosure experience for a loan: from entry to exit (reinstated/cured/paid, or sale->REO). A cured loan may re-enter as a new episode, keyed by (loanid, deal_start); N:N with BK.

nodes.desc_zh: CFPB依RESPA制定的按揭服务实施细则（12 CFR Part 1024），1024.30-1024.41规定servicer对违约借款人和LM的处理义务（含SPOC、完整申请审查、上诉权），是本项目LM/FCL合规字段的法规来源。
nodes.desc_en: CFPB's RESPA mortgage-servicing rules (12 CFR Part 1024); 1024.30-1024.41 set servicer duties to defaulted borrowers and LM (SPOC, complete-application review, appeal rights), the regulatory basis for the project's LM/FCL compliance fields.

nodes.desc_zh: 借款人尚未实际拖欠但面临可预见还款困难的状态。Reg X/投资人指南要求servicer提前对其进行LM评估，而非等真正违约。对应BPS字段imminent_default。
nodes.desc_en: Borrower not yet delinquent but facing foreseeable payment difficulty. Reg X/investor guides require early LM evaluation rather than waiting for actual default. Maps to BPS field imminent_default.

nodes.desc_zh: Notice of Intent/Notice of Default，司法州对止赎前催告函的称谓，要求限期还款否则启动止赎，是FCL前置步骤不等于已启动。
nodes.desc_en: Notice of Intent / Notice of Default; the judicial-state name for the pre-foreclosure demand letter requiring payment within a deadline; a prerequisite, not foreclosure itself.

nodes.desc_zh: Mortgage Bankers Association，美国抵押贷款行业全国性权威协会，制定逾期状态分类标准，本项目特指其文本枚举取值规范。
nodes.desc_en: Mortgage Bankers Association; the US mortgage industry's national association whose delinquency classification (text enum standard) this project follows.

nodes.desc_zh: Days Past Due，从next_payment_due_date到报告日的days360差值，用于按档位划分逾期严重程度。
nodes.desc_en: Days Past Due; the days360 difference from next_payment_due_date to the report date, used to bucket delinquency severity.

nodes.desc_zh: Unpaid Principal Balance，贷款当前剩余未还本金，是衡量贷款规模的基础指标。
nodes.desc_en: Unpaid Principal Balance; the principal still owed on a loan, the base measure of loan size.

nodes.desc_zh: Deed-in-Lieu (of Foreclosure) 的缩写，借款人自愿交还房产抵偿贷款；亦为Newrez的LM deal枚举值。
nodes.desc_en: Abbreviation for Deed-in-Lieu (of Foreclosure); also a Newrez LM deal value.

nodes.desc_zh: Short Sale的缩写，以低于贷款余额价格出售房产的LM/止赎替代方案。
nodes.desc_en: Abbreviation for Short Sale, selling the property below the loan balance as an LM/foreclosure alternative.

nodes.desc_zh: Mortgage Insurance（含PMI私人贷款保险）；某些LM/DIL流程需等待MI审批（Awaiting MI Approval）。
nodes.desc_en: Mortgage Insurance (incl. private MI). Some LM/DIL flows require MI approval (Awaiting MI Approval).

nodes.desc_zh: Net Present Value，LM评估测算模型，用于判断方案对投资人是否优于止赎。
nodes.desc_en: Net Present Value; an LM evaluation model used to decide whether a workout beats foreclosure for the investor.

nodes.desc_zh: Underwriting，LM流程中对借款人材料的承保审核阶段。
nodes.desc_en: Underwriting; the LM stage that reviews/qualifies the borrower's documents.

nodes.desc_zh: Cash for Keys，补偿借款人腾房交钥匙的退出处置方式（字典定义但当前数据未出现）。
nodes.desc_en: Cash for Keys; compensating the borrower to vacate and hand over keys (defined in dictionary, not yet in data).

nodes.desc_zh: Government-Sponsored Enterprise，如Fannie Mae/Freddie Mac，设定LM/FCL审批与超期规则。
nodes.desc_en: Government-Sponsored Enterprise (e.g., Fannie Mae/Freddie Mac) that sets LM/FCL approval and timeline rules.

nodes.desc_zh: Proof of Claim，债权人在破产程序中向法院登记欠款金额的文件；Ch.7通常70天内、Ch.13方案确认前提交，未及时提交可能丧失分配资格。
nodes.desc_en: Proof of Claim; creditor's filing of the debt amount in bankruptcy. Due within ~70 days (Ch.7) or before plan confirmation (Ch.13); late filing risks exclusion from distribution.

nodes.desc_zh: Business Planning System，PrefectFlow的下游报告消费系统，月度分析结果最终同步至此，含7阶段FCL运营监控管道。
nodes.desc_en: Business Planning System; PrefectFlow's downstream reporting consumer to which monthly results sync, including the 7-stage FCL operational pipeline.

nodes.desc_zh: 代表贷款所有方负责日常管理（收款、跟踪逾期、执行止赎）的机构，是FCL/BK状态的申报方。本项目涉及SLS/Newrez/Carrington/Selene/MRC/Arvest/CapeCodFive/FCI共8家。
nodes.desc_en: Entity managing the loan for the owner (collections, delinquency tracking, foreclosure); the reporter of FCL/BK status. The project covers 8: SLS, Newrez, Carrington, Selene, MRC, Arvest, CapeCodFive, FCI.

nodes.desc_zh: Servicemembers Civil Relief Act，军人保护法，可作为触发FCL-Hold（止赎暂停）的原因之一。
nodes.desc_en: Servicemembers Civil Relief Act; military protection that can be a cause of an FCL-Hold.

nodes.desc_zh: 拍卖成交价低于房贷余额的差额。无BK时部分州可向借款人追偿；Ch.7 discharge后个人债务已清除，差额不可追偿。
nodes.desc_en: The shortfall between sale price and loan balance. Without BK, some states allow pursuit of the borrower; after Ch.7 discharge it is uncollectible as personal debt.

nodes.desc_zh: Servicer向系统同步数据时的快照日期，通常滞后1-2天；BPS用DATEDIFF(今日,dataasof)补偿延迟以反映当日FCL天数。
nodes.desc_en: Snapshot date when a servicer syncs data, usually 1-2 days behind; BPS uses DATEDIFF(today, dataasof) to compensate for delay in today's FCL days.

nodes.desc_zh: 成交后产权转让契据在县/郡登记处正式登记的日期，是止赎法律流程的完成点（产权过户，多数→REO），约在拍卖后2-3周；BPS用作foreclosure_completed_date首选、近似REO取得日。
nodes.desc_en: Date the post-sale deed is recorded at the county registry, the completion point of foreclosure (title transfer, mostly to REO), ~2-3 weeks after sale; BPS's preferred foreclosure_completed_date and proxy REO acquisition date.

nodes.desc_zh: FCT Report Date，报告截止日=as-of月的下月第一天，是portmonthbase和月报分析的时间维度键，也是days360逾期计算的终点参数。
nodes.desc_en: FCT Report Date; the report cutoff = first day of the month after the as-of month, the time key for monthly analysis and the end parameter of the days360 calc.

nodes.desc_zh: Consumer Financial Protection Bureau，依Dodd-Frank Act设立的美国联邦消费金融监管机构，其按揭服务规则(Reg X)是本项目LM/FCL合规要求来源。
nodes.desc_en: Consumer Financial Protection Bureau; the US federal consumer-finance regulator (Dodd-Frank) whose mortgage-servicing rules (Reg X) drive the project's LM/FCL compliance.

nodes.desc_zh: Real Estate Settlement Procedures Act，规范房地产结算与按揭服务的美国联邦法律，CFPB通过Reg X实施其按揭服务条款。
nodes.desc_en: Real Estate Settlement Procedures Act; the federal law on real-estate settlement and mortgage servicing, implemented by CFPB via Reg X.

nodes.desc_zh: Single Point of Contact，Reg X 12 CFR 1024.40要求为违约借款人指派的唯一服务对接人，避免LM流程中反复转接。对应字段single_point_of_contact。
nodes.desc_en: Single Point of Contact; Reg X 12 CFR 1024.40 requires a dedicated contact for defaulted borrowers to avoid repeated transfers during LM. Maps to single_point_of_contact.

nodes.desc_zh: BPS衡量FCL各阶段合规的三层天数框架：Target(按州/司法类型预设基准)、Actual(两端timeline相减)、Var(actual−target，正=超期)。15阶段各一组。
nodes.desc_en: BPS's three-tier compliance framework per FCL stage: Target (preset by state/type), Actual (timeline diff), Var (actual-target, positive=behind). One set per 15 stages.
